name: ATM90E32 Power Sensor
description: `number` entities can be configured to provide calibration voltage & current reference values at runtime.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: The ID of the `atm90e32` sensor defined above. Required if using more than one sensor.

config_entries.label: Reference Current
config_entries.description: Fine grained gain calibration for a known current of the circuit a CT is measuring. It is used to calculate the value for `gain_ct`. To be used in conjunction with the `run_gain_calibration` button. `enable_gain_calibration` must be `True`. Each phase below defaults to `min_value: 1`, `max_value: 200`, `mode: box`, `optimistic: True`, `step: 0.1`.

config_entries.label: Phase A
config_entries.description: Phase A reference current field. All options from [Number](https://esphome.io/components/number#config-number)

config_entries.label: Phase B
config_entries.description: Phase B reference current field. All options from [Number](https://esphome.io/components/number#config-number)

config_entries.label: Phase C
config_entries.description: Phase C reference current field. All options from [Number](https://esphome.io/components/number#config-number)

config_entries.label: Reference Voltage
config_entries.description: Fine grained gain calibration of a known voltage that a voltage transformer is connected to. It is used to calculate the value for `gain_voltage`. To be used in conjunction with the `run_gain_calibration` button. `enable_gain_calibration` must be `True`. Each phase below defaults to `min_value: 100`, `max_value: 200`, `mode: box`, `optimistic: True`, `step: 0.1`.

config_entries.label: Phase A
config_entries.description: Phase A reference voltage field. All options from [Number](https://esphome.io/components/number#config-number)

config_entries.label: Phase B
config_entries.description: Phase B reference voltage field. If not specified, will use the value from `phase_a` (CircuitSetup's 6 channel meter has voltage phases tied together). All options from [Number](https://esphome.io/components/number#config-number)

config_entries.label: Phase C
config_entries.description: Phase C reference voltage field. If not specified, will use the value from `phase_a` (CircuitSetup's 6 channel meter has voltage phases tied together). All options from [Number](https://esphome.io/components/number#config-number)
